compiled_state.title: Write RED test for scan-config-keys.sh (test behavioral contract: all 4 locations scanned)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What
Write a new behavioral test `tests/scripts/test-scan-config-keys.sh` that asserts the expected behavior of the not-yet-existing `plugins/dso/scripts/scan-config-keys.sh`. The test must fail (RED) until Task B implements the script.

## Test approach (Given / When / Then)
- Given a temporary repo fixture containing: (a) a script under `plugins/dso/scripts/` that calls `read-config.sh some.key`; (b) a file under `plugins/dso/scripts/` that uses inline `_read_config_key "other.key"`; (c) a file under `plugins/dso/scripts/` that runs `grep '^namespace.example=' .claude/dso-config.conf | cut -d= -f2`; (d) a `.claude/dso-config.conf` containing `documented.key=value` and `namespace.example=val`; (e) a `plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md` documenting only `documented.key`
- When the test invokes `plugins/dso/scripts/scan-config-keys.sh <fixture-repo-root>`
- Then the script must (1) exit 0; (2) print to stdout a gap list containing the undocumented keys: `some.key`, `other.key`, `namespace.example` (any order); (3) NOT include `documented.key` in the gap list

## Files to Modify
- `tests/scripts/test-scan-config-keys.sh` (create) — the behavioral test
- `.test-index` (modify) — add mapping `plugins/dso/scripts/scan-config-keys.sh: tests/scripts/test-scan-config-keys.sh` AND append RED marker `[test_scan_config_keys_gap_list]`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-scan-config-keys.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry added mapping scan-config-keys.sh to the test file
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/scripts/scan-config-keys.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index RED marker [test_scan_config_keys_gap_list] is present
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_scan_config_keys_gap_list\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test currently fails (RED) because the implementation script does not yet exist
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-scan-config-keys.sh; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] Test uses a temporary fixture directory (mktemp -d) and does NOT depend on the real repo state
  Verify: grep -q 'mktemp -d' tests/scripts/test-scan-config-keys.sh

comments.author: Test

Creates mktemp -d fixture with 4 files: caller-a.sh (read-config.sh call), caller-b.sh (_read_config_key call), caller-c.sh (inline grep), .claude/dso-config.conf (2 keys), CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (1 documented key).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: .test-index updated. Entry: plugins/dso/scripts/scan-config-keys.sh:tests/scripts/test-scan-config-keys.sh [test_scan_config_keys_gap_list]. Staged via git add. Entry confirmed present in both working tree and staged index.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: RED state confirmed. Test runs and fails with 4 failures (exit 127 — scan-config-keys.sh does not exist). All 5 acceptance criteria pass. Test is behavioral: executes the script, asserts on exit code and stdout gap list content.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: RED test writer complete. TEST_RESULT:written. TEST_FILE: tests/scripts/test-scan-config-keys.sh. RED_ASSERTION: script exits non-zero (127) because scan-config-keys.sh does not exist. GREEN when script is implemented and correctly scans all 4 locations.
